x-enumeration-literals.name: Account and Balance Monitoring Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks cash balances, deposits, loans, and other account types in real-time or on a scheduled basis.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exposure Assessment Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Monitors credit, market, and operational exposures to determine potential financial risk.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Obligation Tracking Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks pending payments, scheduled transfers, and repayment obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Liquidity & Availability Analysis Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Assesses available funds for operations, investments, or collateral requirements.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting & Alert Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Generates financial status reports, alerts for thresholds, overdrafts, or covenant breaches.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Integration with Risk Management Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Works with collateral, position tracking, and amount block services to ensure accurate financial health assessment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Historical Trend Analysis Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides insight into financial performance, cash flow trends, and account activity over time.
